meaning: n.爱和女人调情的男人,玩弄女性的男人
examples: Dilettante: a philanderer who seduces the several arts and letters each in turn for another.
Swearing he had never so much as looked at another woman, Jack assured Jill he was no philanderer.
When coming across a brand whose boss is, say, a philanderer, they recognise it but don't remember why.
He could never win over the people the way that Robert might have, had he not been a drunkard and a philanderer.
